name: Exposed
description: Exposed — Secure tunneling and secrets management tool for sharing local development environments with collaborators.

seo.title: Exposed — Secrets Management
seo.meta_description: Exposed: Exposed — Secure tunneling and secrets management tool for sharing local development environments with collaborators.

when_to_use: Secure localhost tunnel sharing for remote pair programming
Webhook endpoint exposure for local integration testing
Secrets-safe environment sharing for contractor onboarding
Temporary secure tunnel for staging demo environments
Collaborator access to local dev server without VPN

pros: Useful for demoing local work securely
cons: Niche overlap of tunnels + secrets is confusing
Small ecosystem vs ngrok or zrok
Not a real secrets backend for prod
review.verdict: Works for local dev sharing, but don't mistake it for production secrets infrastructure.
review.best_for: Developers sharing local previews with a little secret metadata.
review.not_for: Teams needing a proper production secrets vault.
